sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32690" key="e)kplokh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκπλοκή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n32690.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unravelling</tr_> : metaph., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">escape,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:4:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.57</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.); <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τινός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:183:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">183.32</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
